title: BEM-872 execute decision
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/protocols','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 12:08 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem871_read_protocol_decision.json')
decision=prev.get('decision','UNKNOWN')
created_files=[]
if decision=='APPROVED':
    final=Path('governance/protocols/BEM872_AGREED_MULTI_AGENT_PROTOCOL.md')
    final.write_text('# BEM-872 | Agreed Multi-Agent Protocol'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Status: APPROVED by BEM-844 Claude response.'+sep+sep+'Source: governance/protocols/BEM870_PROTOCOL_RESULT_FROM_BEM844.md'+sep)
    created_files.append(str(final))
    status='approved_protocol_finalized'
    next_action='resume implementation roadmap'
elif decision=='BLOCKED':
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem872_blocker_repair_runtime_probe.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v21','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-872 continue repair after BLOCKED protocol result: prove real Claude runtime/action evidence','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(q))
    status='blocked_protocol_runtime_repair_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick; repair real Claude runtime/action evidence, not claim approval'
elif decision=='CHANGE_REQUIRED':
    status='change_required_extraction_next'
    next_action='extract required changes and patch protocol/runtime'
else:
    status='unknown_decision_repair_next'
    next_action='repair response format to include explicit Decision line'
state={'bem':'BEM-872','status':status,'decision':decision,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem872_execute_decision_route.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem872_execute_decision_route.md').write_text('# BEM-872 | Execute Decision Route | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem872_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-872'+sep+sep+'Decision: '+decision+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem872_execute_decision_route.json','governance/reports/bem872_execute_decision_route.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem872_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-871 decision route: finalized approved protocol or queued runtime repair for BLOCKED/other decisions')
"""
No issue comments.
